ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the weather data was recorded */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the weather data was recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather observation */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the weather observation (24-hour format) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Recorded temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "dewpoint" REAL /* Recorded dewpoint in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity percentage */,
  "wind_direction" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in inches of mercury */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the weather (e.g., Clear, BKN) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation amount in inches */,
  "source" TEXT /* Data source (e.g., NWS, private station) */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Weather station ID */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Sea-level pressure */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in miles */,
  "weather_icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_records_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the city is located */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record being reviewed */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city to which the alert applies */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Storm, Flood) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the alert */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the alert */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., warning, advisory) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_alerts_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city for which statistics are calculated */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature over a period */,
  "total_precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation over a period */,
  "average_wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed over a period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the statistical period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the statistical period */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., daily, monthly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_statistics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
